variants.title: HiFi Filter KAO 6213 Engine Breather Kit | Replaces the Wix Filter SA10046
variants.description: The genuine HiFi Filter KAO 6213 Engine Breather Kit is HiFi's replacement to the Wix Filter SA10046. Easy to install and replace, the KAO 6213 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.
